/usr/bin/gcc -fPIC -Wall -g -DPDL_SATELLITE_SUPPORT=1 -DPDL_BMC_SUPPORT=1 -DPDL_MCU_SUPPORT=1 -DPDL_WATCHDOG_SUPPORT=1 -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L -D_XOPEN_SOURCE=700 -D_GNU_SOURCE -DPCL_PLATFORM_TI_AM625=1 -DPCL_PRODUCT_H200_100P=1 -shared -Wl,-soname,libpdl.so -o libpdl.so CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_watchdog.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_satellite/pdl_satellite.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_satellite/pdl_satellite_can.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_bmc/pdl_bmc.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_bmc/pdl_bmc_ipmi.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_bmc/pdl_bmc_redfish.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_bmc/pdl_bmc_transport.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_mcu/pdl_mcu.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_mcu/pdl_mcu_can.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_mcu/pdl_mcu_protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/pdl.dir/src/pdl_mcu/pdl_mcu_serial.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_health/build/pcl:/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_health/build/hal:/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_health/build/osal ../pcl/libpcl.so ../hal/libhal.so ../osal/libosal.so -lpthread -lrt -lm
